meaning: The process of transferring pollen to help plants reproduce.
A community of living organisms and their environment.
The ability of an ecosystem or organism to recover quickly from difficulties or disturbances.
The variety of living organisms in an environment.
A natural glow or brightness that spreads light and energy.
The natural process by which a biological community undergoes orderly and predictable changes in composition and structure over time.
The process by which plants make food using sunlight.
To grow or develop in a healthy, vigorous way, much like a plant thriving in optimal soil and sunlight.
To gradually decrease, weaken, or recede, mirroring the movement of the tide flowing back away from the shore.
The amount of solar radiation reaching a given area of the Earth's surface.
To begin to grow, sprout, or develop after a period of latency, symbolic of new ideas or career paths starting to take root.
